english_news.title: Three New York Democrats backed by Mamdani win House seat primaries; 2 incumbents lose
english_news.summary: Two candidates backed by the Democratic Socialist of America won their primaries, a year after the DSA-backed Zohran Mamdani won New York mayor's race.

english_news.title: Ukraine is raising the cost of war for Russia — and testing Putin's resolve
english_news.summary: A string of political victories and deep-strike successes has bolstered confidence in Ukraine amid its long-running war with Russia.

english_news.title: Brent falls below $76, notching its lowest level since day before U.S.-Iran war
english_news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.

english_news.title: Defense stocks plummet after Germany to scrap warship plans; Rheinmetall stock down 13%
english_news.summary: Berlin is planning to scrap a multi-billion-euro project to build the F126 frigates, according to the Financial Times.

english_news.title: Defense giant KNDS plans IPO in Paris and Frankfurt
english_news.summary: KNDS plans to list shares in Paris and Frankfurt, with current shareholders expected to sell up to 20% of existing share capital.

english_news.title: Asia tech stocks rebound after global rout; Samsung jumps 9%
english_news.summary: Asia's technology stocks mostly rebounded on Wednesday amid choppy trading following a global selloff in the previous session.

english_news.title: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
english_news.summary: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.

english_news.title: Cerebras falls 10% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
english_news.summary: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.

english_news.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
english_news.summary: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

english_news.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
english_news.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

english_news.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
english_news.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

english_news.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
english_news.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

english_news.title: Sydney woman wakes from induced coma more than a week after shark attack
english_news.summary: Leah Stewart, 34, had one of her arms amputated after she was bitten while swimming at Coogee Beach.

english_news.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
english_news.summary: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

english_news.title: Eight sentenced to 450 years in prison over anti-ICE riot where officer was shot
english_news.summary: An officer was shot in the neck during the Texas disorder by "Antifa Cell operatives", prosecutors said.

english_news.title: Bondi Beach shooting hero pleads not guilty to alleged assault on his father
english_news.summary: Ahmed al Ahmed tackled one of the gunmen who killed 15 people at a Jewish event in December.

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：诶? AI! AI这个月、AI这一年、AI这五年｜36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以“今年盛夏”为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些“少数人” 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

以下为对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 仙工智能的过山车：暗盘破发7%、首日冲高38%
chinese_news.summary:
本文约1100字，建议阅读3分钟

作者 | 彭孝秋

6月24日，仙工智能（06106.HK）正式在港交所敲钟上市，开盘平开，报101.6港元，随后一路拉升，最高冲到140.50（+38.3%）。之后回落，截至发稿报115.70港元，仍涨13.88%。振幅38.29%，成交5.33亿，市值127.8亿港元。

按这个市值算，其去年4.42亿元收入，静态市销率已升到约25倍，成为港股估值最贵的机器人新股。全球AMR第一的极智嘉约9倍，

chinese_news.title: AI × OPC的新可能：一个人，就是一支队伍｜2026WAVES
chinese_news.summary:
2026年6月16日，36氪2026 WAVES 新浪潮大会在广州番禺良仓新造创意园开幕。以下这场圆桌论坛是大会首日下午的收官议题，探讨 AI 时代 OPC（One Person Company）的真实生态。

八九十年代，一辆三轮车、一个摊位，就能撑起一门生意。今天的 OPC 看起来形似，但底层逻辑已经彻底不同。

过去个体户的杠杆是体力、经验和地理位置，本质上是基于本地的 LBS 服务，脱不开那个具体的摊位。今天 OPC 的杠杆是代码和媒体——边际成本几乎为零的杠杆，加上 AI 带来的生产力平权，让一个人第一次拥有了接近公司的交付能力。

这场圆桌汇集了 OPC 生态的上中下游：已经跑出商业闭环的 OPC 创业者、每天和年轻创业者打交道的高校创新创业负责人、云计算和底层算力平台的专家。几个值得关注的行业趋势在讨论中浮出水面：

第一，云的用户画像正在发生迁移，云平台的产品逻辑也在随之重构。阿里云今年2月的用户调研发现，传统“写代码的开发者”仅占现场用户的20%，产品与运营背景的人已占35%，企业主占21%。基础设

chinese_news.title: 微信AI助手小微，还有许多做不到的事情｜产品观察
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王毓婵

编辑｜张雨忻

微信AI助手“小微”正在灰度内测，36氪智能涌现拿到了首批测试资格。

先说结论：一些简单操作，小微做得没那么好；一些复杂操作，小微反而做得比较好。

小微入口

小微的服务主要基于微信自研模型WeLM，部分回答可能会调用DeepSeek来处理。主入口在微信首页左上角，默认交互方式是语音转文字，亦可直接手动打字输入。

小微会默认开启记忆能力、个性化服务和授权帮助模型改进效果。用户也可以在

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 on June 30, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will crude oil (Brent) close below $70/barrel on July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump actively pressuring oil companies to lower prices; Brent already at lowest since pre-Iran escalation ($76); but geopolitical tail risk (Strait of Hormuz, Ukraine) not fully priced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC oil market news; Rubio warnings; US-Iran deal shipping surge (42 ships Saturday)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the China humanoid robotics market ship >500,000 units in 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Morgan Stanley equity research report or China robotics industry association shipment data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Morgan Stanley doubled forecast as commercialization accelerates; but consensus still treats Chinese robotics as fringe; early real-world deployment signals ignored by Western markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Morgan Stanley sharply raised outlook; 36Kr WAVES 2026 AI/hardware focus; Xianggong Robotics (仙工智能) Hong Kong IPO +38.3% (06106.HK)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will MiCA-regulated stablecoin transaction volume in EU exceed $50 billion (30-day rolling) by October 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Glassnode or Chainalysis EU stablecoin volume dashboard
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: OpenPayd just secured license; CLARITY Act debate heating up; but crypto adoption in regulated zones still niche; early-mover regulatory arbitrage not yet valued.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph MiCA licensing news; Catholic leaders/law enforcement challenging CLARITY Act transparency

market_questions_to_create.question: Will DXY (US Dollar Index) close 2026 below 103?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: ICE US Dollar Index (DXY) year-end settlement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump-era trade pressure, oil price cuts, and Ukraine military momentum signal USD weakness; but geopolitical risk (Iran, France heatwave displacement) supports safe-haven demand.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Oil declining; Ukraine bolstering confidence; Congress breaking with Trump on Iran war powers

market_questions_to_create.question: Will any Mamdani-backed NYC Democratic candidate win a state or federal office in the November 2026 general election?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: NY State Board of Elections official results
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 3 primary wins (including Brad Lander House primary); DSA momentum in NYC post-mayoralty; but general election swing voter behavior vs. primary base divergence underestimated.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC/CNBC primary sweep; CLARITY Act debate on accountability suggests movement politics resonating

investment_theses.thesis: Short DXY / Long commodity futures (oil, gold) as Trump pressure on energy prices and Ukraine military success signal USD structural weakness through 2026-Q4.
supporting_signals: Brent crude collapsed to lowest since pre-Iran escalation; Trump publicly demanding price cuts from oil companies (CNBC)
Ukraine string of political victories and deep-strike successes bolstering confidence (CNBC)
Strait of Hormuz traffic surge (42 ships Saturday) after US-Iran deal signals de-escalation and petrodollar risk-off (BBC)
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical shock (heatwave-driven migration crisis in France, anti-ICE riot in Texas, Bondi shooting aftermath) could reignite safe-haven demand and push USD higher.
investment_theses.expression: DXY put spreads (103 strike 6-month expiry) + long GLD (gold ETF) / USO (crude ETF) equal weight

investment_theses.thesis: Overweight China humanoid robotics / AI hardware exposure (via Hang Seng or HSI) as Morgan Stanley sharply raises commercialization forecast and 36Kr WAVES 2026 signals mainstreaming of hard tech.
supporting_signals: Morgan Stanley doubled China humanoid robot shipment forecast; early commercial deployment accelerating (CNBC)
Xianggong Robotics (仙工智能) Hong Kong IPO +38.3% on first day despite dark pool -7% break (06106.HK, 36Kr)
36Kr WAVES 2026 major theme: 'AI从技术概念走进产业深水区' (AI moving from tech concept into deep industrial waters); OPC + AI wave (36Kr)
investment_theses.counter_view: Cerebras (pure-play AI chip) down 11% post-IPO; global chip selloff ongoing; margin compression in AI hardware may dampen Chinese pure-plays valuation.
investment_theses.expression: HSI Hang Seng Index (Hong Kong) futures or EWH (iShares MSCI Hong Kong ETF) + selective long Xianggong-like robotics names via Alibaba or Tencent tech portfolios

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin but tactically underweight near-term (target $59-62k floor) as OG accumulation signals bullish macro but liquidity dries up and chip selloff cascades into crypto.
supporting_signals: Bitcoin 'OG' investors slowed selling (bullish signal); but CryptoQuant warns halt to Saylor/MicroStrategy buying (CoinDesk)
Bitcoin dropped toward $62k as chip selloff deepens second day (CoinDesk live markets)
CBDC ban passage near + crypto PAC $5.5M Congress wins; World Liberty Financial scrutiny pressuring sentiment short-term (CoinDesk political + Cointelegraph)
investment_theses.counter_view: Senate hearings on Trump-UAE $500M deal may accelerate regulatory clarity and crypto legitimacy narrative, supporting near-term floor and upside re-acceleration.
investment_theses.expression: BTC spot (buy dips to $60-62k, sell rips to $67-70k) or BTC 3-month perpetual futures (short-term hedge, long-term bull)

investment_theses.thesis: Avoid pure-play AI chip stocks (NVDA, Cerebras) near-term; rotate into EU-regulated crypto infrastructure (OpenPayd, MiCA-eligible stablecoin platforms) as regulatory tailwind + Roubini tokenization entry validates compliance moat.
supporting_signals: Cerebras down 11% after IPO earnings; global chip selloff persistent (CNBC, CoinDesk)
OpenPayd secures MiCA license; stablecoin adoption growing in Europe (Cointelegraph)
Roubini (prominent crypto critic) launches 'Technodollar' tokenization project; signals mainstream acceptance of regulated assets (CoinDesk)
investment_theses.counter_view: NVDA upside intact if China humanoid robot boom drives GPU demand; Morgan Stanley forecasts signal AI infrastructure capex not slowing.
investment_theses.expression: Short NVDA calls (sell upside above $125) + long crypto infrastructure ETFs or select tokens with MiCA exposure (USDC, Kraken ecosystem proxies)

investment_theses.thesis: Long political-uncertainty hedges (gold, VIX calls) through November 2026 US midterms given Mamdani DSA sweep in NYC, Senate-Trump clash on Iran war powers, and crypto PAC momentum signaling unpredictable policy outcomes.
supporting_signals: Three Mamdani DSA-backed candidates won NYC House primaries; Brad Lander unseated Dan Goldman over Israel-Gaza (BBC, CNBC)
Congress passed war powers measure breaking with Trump over Iran for first time (BBC)
Crypto PAC $5.5M Congress picks advance; crypto allies gaining (CoinDesk)
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump consolidation of Congress may accelerate and stabilize policy; pro-crypto, pro-energy executive action could reduce near-term volatility.
investment_theses.expression: GLD (gold ETF) 20% + VIX 3-month call spreads (20-25 strike) 5% hedge + long DBC (commodities) 10% vs. cash 65% allocation
